title: Redworld items Resource pack
description: The resourcepack for the Redworld items datapack, its Dad Custom Item Textures and custom Sounds to to Game, an Exempel are the Food and the Money
body:
A datapack adding custom items for the Project Redworld by TTH-Projects

add datapack to get the items easily via command: [Redworld-Items-DP](https://modrinth.com/project/u4gaB5WJ)

Items added:

- Redstone Cola
- Fries
- Phone
- Admin Ticket
- Ticket
- Credit Card
- 1€
- 2€
- 5€
- 10€
- 20€
- 50€
- 100€
- key
- and more

made by [ Vanilama](https://vanilama-modded.github.io/Minecraft-Tools-Wiki/)
